content: We can refactor the 2025 configurable ICM for swarm UAV autonomous agents to use the Principal Component Analysis (PCA) framework formalized by Abdi and Williams (2010) to compress high-dimensional inverse dynamics prediction errors into a low-dimensional intrinsic curiosity reward signal, filtering out noisy stochastic environmental features that do not contribute to meaningful task discovery for the swarm. This targeted reward signal can prevent the swarm from wasting exploration power on uninformative random environmental fluctuations while encouraging coordinated discovery of high-value novel target regions.
